newsSinceJun6: No material fundamental news since June 6. Today's -2.47% merely unwinds the June 8 +3.0% pop (net flat over two sessions; flow-driven, not fundamental). Confirmed catalyst: fiscal Q3 FY2026 earnings pre-market Wednesday June 17 (date announced June 3). Most recent analyst action remains Goldman Sachs' $384 PT from May 21; consensus PT (~$264 per MarketBeat) sits well below the $355 spot, i.e. the rerating has outrun the sell side. GuruFocus flags shares ~109% above its GF Value with ~$14M insider selling over three months - consistent with the existing crowded/rerated bucket, not new information.

sources.label: StockTitan - Jabil Q3 FY2026 earnings call set for June 17
Business Wire - Jabil FQ3 2026 earnings announcement date
GuruFocus - JBL up 3.0% but above GF Value, insider selling
MarketBeat - JBL analyst price targets (consensus ~$264, Goldman $384 high)

verdicts.rankRationale: Hold at 26: no new fundamental evidence since June 6 and yesterday's hold stands; today's -2.5% is a trivial giveback of Monday's +3.0%, not a sell-off deep enough to restore asymmetry. Small negative drift because spot now sits ~35% above consensus PT with persistent insider selling, deepening the crowded/rerated characterization on this residual-alpha lens.
verdicts.bull: Grid-to-rack power, liquid cooling and AI-infra manufacturing keep Jabil a genuine bottleneck node, and the June 17 FQ3 print could force another guide-up after Q2's 23.9% YoY revenue growth.
verdicts.neutral: Thesis intact and well-known; at +47.7% YTD and ~$37B cap the stock is a consensus AI-infra proxy, and net-flat two-day price action plus no fresh contracts or analyst moves leaves residual alpha unchanged.
verdicts.bear: Shares trade ~109% above GuruFocus' modeled value and ~35% above the ~$264 consensus target with ~$14M of insider selling in three months; an in-line or soft June 17 guide hits a crowded, momentum-owned name hard on thin EMS margins.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Fiscal Q3 FY2026 earnings and AI-revenue/capacity guidance, pre-market June 17, 2026.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Post-rerating de-rating: a merely in-line June 17 guide triggers multiple compression in an over-owned AI-infra proxy.
